# @nimiq-faucet/vue

Vue 3 composables over `@nimiq-faucet/sdk`.

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { useFaucetClaim } from '@nimiq-faucet/vue';

const { claim, status, txId, isPending, error } = useFaucetClaim({
  client: { url: import.meta.env.VITE_FAUCET_URL },
  address: props.address,
  hostContext: { uid: hashedUid, kycLevel: 'email' },
});
</script>
```

Also exports `useFaucetStatus(client, idRef)` and `useFaucetStream(client, onEvent)`.
